column1: # kana<TAB>surface — longest-match lookup, before CTC. Lines starting with
# # are comments. Run-level match: the whole kana segment between non-kana
# boundaries must equal the key, or a prefix of it (longest-prefix wins).
# Homophones: repeat kana on separate lines, each mapping to one surface.
# LM scores them in context at decode time. Ordering here just gives a
# deterministic tie-break when contexts are identical.
